chooseResponse.q: What are your plans for the weekend?
options: I have a lot of homework.

conversation.transcript:
Student: Hey, did you see the schedule for the film festival?
Advisor: Yes, I think it's going to be really interesting this year.
Student: I can’t wait to see some of the foreign films!
Advisor: Me too! I love how they often tell different stories than Hollywood films.

questions.q: What does the student look forward to?
What is the advisor's opinion on the festival?
questions.explain: 顧問認為這個影展會很有趣。

announcement.transcript: Attention students! The library will be closing early tomorrow at 5 PM due to maintenance work. Please make sure to return or renew your books before then. Thank you for your understanding.

questions.q: Why is the library closing early?
questions.explain: 圖書館因為維修工作而提前關閉。

questions.q: What time will the library close tomorrow?
questions.explain: 圖書館明天將於下午5點關閉。

talk.transcript: Today, we'll explore the concept of biodiversity. Biodiversity refers to the variety of life found on Earth, including the different species of plants, animals, and microorganisms. It is essential for ecosystem health and resilience. High biodiversity contributes to the stability of ecosystems and supports processes like pollination and nutrient cycling. Unfortunately, human activities such as deforestation and pollution are threatening biodiversity globally. Conservation efforts are crucial to protect these natural resources and maintain the balance of our ecosystems.

questions.explain: 生物多樣性是指地球上生命的多樣性。
生物多樣性支持生態系統的運作。

questions.q: What are some threats to biodiversity?
questions.explain: 城市發展威脅生物多樣性。

questions.q: What is a key action to protect biodiversity?
questions.explain: 實施保護措施是保護生物多樣性的關鍵。
